name: Native Service Layer
description: Rust napi-rs native module implementing BLE transport, cross-platform peripheral support (macOS CoreBluetooth, Linux BlueZ, Windows GattServiceProvider), cryptographic signing with Ed25519/JWS, SQLite persistence, and expression evaluation.

name: Application Bridge Layer
description: Electron main process, IPC handlers, and preload script providing the bridge between the Rust native module and the React renderer process with sandbox security.

name: UI Layer
description: React renderer components including the main calculator app, log store with React external store pattern, logging middleware, browser-based test double implementation, styles, and HTML entry points.

name: Shared Types Layer
description: TypeScript type definitions and API contracts shared between Electron processes, including calculator API types, IPC channel names, and expression evaluation utilities.

name: Build Infrastructure Layer
description: Build scripts, cross-platform packaging orchestrators, release automation, and native module compilation scripts for macOS, Windows, and Linux targets.

name: Configuration Layer
description: Project configuration files for NPM package, TypeScript compiler, Vite dev server, Vitest testing, Rust Cargo crate, Electron Builder packaging, and ESLint linting.

name: CI/CD Layer
description: GitHub Actions workflow for cross-platform native module compilation, Electron app packaging, and release automation across macOS, Linux, and Windows targets.

name: Documentation Layer
description: Project documentation including README, architecture deep-dive, developer onboarding guide, security and runtime details, UI layout specifications, Evolve theme design, and Rust native module README.

name: Project Tools Layer
description: Tool configuration and meta files including Understand-Anything exclusions and project-specific tool configuration.
